questions: If you could ride along with any unit for one shift — K-9, traffic, detectives, dispatch — which would you pick, and why?
What's a skill you learned this year that you're actually proud of?
You get one superpower, but it only works while on duty. What do you pick?
What's the best piece of advice anyone ever gave you?
Coffee, energy drinks, or tea — what actually gets you through a long shift?
What's a movie or series you can rewatch endlessly without getting bored?
If this server had its own police academy class, what would the graduation prank be?
What's a small thing that instantly makes your day better?
You can have dinner with anyone, living or historical. Who's at the table?
What's the most underrated snack, and why is it criminally overlooked?
If you could instantly master any instrument, which one and what's the first song?
What's a hobby you've always wanted to try but never started?
Describe your perfect day off in three steps.
What's the weirdest fun fact you know off the top of your head?
If the precinct had a mascot, what animal should it be and what's its name?
What game have you sunk the most hours into, ever?
You're planning the server's road trip: one destination, one snack, one song on repeat. Go.
What's something you believed as a kid that turned out hilariously wrong?
Which fictional detective would you actually trust with a real case?
What's your go-to comfort food after a rough day?
If you won the lottery tomorrow, what's the FIRST thing you'd do (after the screaming)?
What's a place you've visited that everyone should see once?
Cats, dogs, or something more exotic — what's the ideal precinct pet?
What's one song that instantly puts you in a good mood?
You can time-travel for one day, but only to observe. Where and when do you go?
What's the best meal you've ever had, and where was it?
If your life had a loading-screen tip, what would it say?
What's a skill everyone should learn before they turn 30?
Pineapple on pizza: crime or misunderstood genius? Argue your case, officer.
What's the last thing that made you laugh out loud?
If you could add ONE feature to this server, what would it be?
What's a book, video, or podcast that genuinely changed how you think?
You're stuck on a desert island with three items from your kitchen. Which three?
What's your most-used emoji, and does it accurately represent you?
If the server threw a talent show, what would you perform?
Early bird or night owl — and has it ever gotten you in trouble?
What's the strangest thing you've ever eaten, and would you eat it again?
You get to rename this channel for one week. What's the new name?
What tiny convenience of modern life would be hardest to give up?
Share a goal you're working toward this month — the precinct's got your back.
